{{Quote|I am the Overseer. The Builders programmed me to enforce discipline among slaves while this monument to the power of the Star Forge was constructed.|A Rakatan guardian droid on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] greeting [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
The '''Rakatan guardian droids''' of [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]] were built by the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] during the height of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]].

[[Overseer (droid)|One such droid]] was used as an overseer for the construction of the [[Star Map]] [[Rakatan ruins (Dantooine)|temple]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. It was left active in case a Rakata should return to inquire about the [[Star Forge]]. As of [[3956 BBY]], no Rakata had entered the area for twenty-five millennia. However, the droid was still functioning and able to serve the first person that entered, [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], a testament to the quality of its construction. This droid was nearly 25,000 years of age, older than the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] itself.<ref name="KOTOR" />

As overseers of [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], these [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were programmed with the languages of the Rakata slave species, including [[Selkath (language)|Selkath]], [[Tusken/Legends|Tusken]], and [[Rakata (language)|Rakata]]. When activated, they would repeatedly speak a phrase, cycling through the languages they knew until the individual interacting with them responded in the same language. For example, when Revan and [[Bastila Shan|Bastila Shan]] entered the Dantooine temple, the Overseer droid attempted interacting with them several times, until they both recognized it's ancient form of [[Selkath (language)|Selkath]], After this it communicated with them in that language.<ref name="KOTOR" /> 

They had significant armor as well as a powerful array of weaponry, and if deactivated, could be fully repaired and reactivated through a [[computer terminal]]. During the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]], [[Darth Malak]] activated a number of construction units to continuously spawn these droids in order to halt, and hopefully kill, his former master, [[Revan/Legends|Revan]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
